text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, it's swaying... But I need to get to the
other side...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
That same dream again... Will I ever get to the
other side?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Troubled by her dream, Manhattan Cafe ends up
staying awake until the early hours...
